headline: Ohio Approval Brings American Water Merger And Debt Questions Into Focus
summary: The Public Utilities Commission of Ohio has approved the all stock merger between American Water Works Company and Essential Utilities. The combined business will operate under the American Water name once the transaction closes. For investors watching NYSE:AWK, this approval comes at a time when the stock trades at $124.29 and has declined 10.5% over the past year and 11.0% over the past five years. The merger decision adds a new piece of information on top of existing share price pressure...
